reason: Authoritative lint + test bar — verify `dart format .` / `flutter analyze` / `flutter test` all pass, that the new widget tests cover R1 (Divider visibility per mode) and R2 (horizontal-mode height-fill, scroll extent, center alignment when narrow), and that no existing tests under test/features/long_stitch/** regress.

Re-check widget structure on every touched widget — StitchControlsPanel (Divider edit minimal, no rearrangement), StitchPreviewCanvas + _PreviewSurface (mode-driven scroll + height-fill branch). New optional `fillAxis` parameter follows the nullable-optional-at-end constructor pattern; no unnecessary Container, const constructors preserved.

Re-check the dynamic scrollDirection switch does not break WindowSizeClass dispatch in stitch_editor_screen.dart. Both compact (canvas-in-Column) and expanded (canvas-on-left + 380-480 dp side panel) layouts must render correctly in both vertical and horizontal stitch modes; constraint flow through the nested LayoutBuilder chain must not assert.

Re-check that every new mode-based conditional explicitly covers both StitchMode.vertical and StitchMode.horizontal. The panel Divider uses `subtitleApplicable` (existing alias); the canvas uses a direct mode check — both must remain exhaustive if a third mode is ever added.
